summary: Sprint 6B: EFI Knowledge Pipeline - All 4 tasks verified and working. 13 tests passed. Regression tests: 428 passed, 13 skipped.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing 14 seed knowledge articles and 14 seed failure cards verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 6B Knowledge Pipeline complete. All 4 tasks verified: (1) process-queue creates knowledge articles from learning events via _create_or_update_knowledge_article(), (2) seed-articles creates 14 global articles from seed failure cards (idempotent), (3) fix-empty-failure-cards handles incomplete cards and marks with excluded_from_efi flag, (4) EFI suggestions endpoint enriches each suggested_path with knowledge_article field containing knowledge_id, title, summary, content.

6B-01_process_queue_creates_knowledge_ar.evidence: Endpoint returns {success: true, processed: N, failed: N, remaining: N}. Knowledge articles created via _create_or_update_knowledge_article in continuous_learning_service.py line 479

6B-02_seed_knowledge_articles.evidence: Returns {success: true, inserted: 0, skipped: 14} - 14 seed articles exist from previous run. Idempotent (skips existing). Function in efi_seed_data.py line 1421

6B-03_fix_empty_failure_cards.evidence: Returns {total_empty_cards, populated_from_tickets, marked_incomplete, embeddings_generated}. Sets excluded_from_efi=True for incomplete cards. Filter verified in find_similar_failure_cards (efi_embedding_service.py line 472)

6B-04_suggestions_include_knowledge_arti.evidence: Each suggested_path includes knowledge_article object with {knowledge_id, title, summary, content}. Verified via curl - saw KB-SEED-FC_* IDs in response. Implementation in efi_guided.py line 239-267
